Grad Cafe Analytics Module 4

This documentation describes the Module 4 Grad Cafe Analytics application. The project refactors the Module 3 Flask and PostgreSQL application into a testable structure with Pytest coverage, deterministic test doubles, GitHub Actions CI, and Sphinx documentation.

Contents:

  • Setup and Running the Application
    • Project layout
    • Install dependencies
    • Environment variables
    • Run the Flask app
    • Run tests
  • Architecture
    • Web layer
    • ETL layer
    • Database and query layer
  • Testing Guide
    • Test organization
    • Markers
    • Coverage
    • Fixtures and test doubles
    • Expected selectors
    • Formatting expectations
  • Operational Notes
    • Busy state policy
    • Idempotency strategy
    • Deterministic tests
    • Troubleshooting
  • API Reference
    • Flask app
    • Database utilities
    • Data loading
    • Pull data
    • Query data
    • Scraping
